# Basin static package: nepal-dhm-basins

Contract: basin-static-artifact/v1

Join `basins.gpkg` to `static_attributes.parquet` on the byte-identical string `gauge_id`.
Climate attributes use the fixed 1991-01-01 through 2020-12-31 climatology window.

Files:
- manifest.json
- basins.gpkg
- static_attributes.parquet
- feature_catalog.json
- validation_report.json
- README.md
